core_model.structure_summary: A linear time-invariant transfer-function block in feedback with a static sector-bounded nonlinearity (a Lur'e system), analyzed via a graphical/frequency condition to certify a sustained oscillation.

variables.meaning: internal state of the linear dynamical block
feedback signal produced by the static nonlinearity
slope bound of the sector nonlinearity
coefficients defining the linear transfer function (plant + controller)

deterministic_skeleton.summary: A linear vector flow closed by a static sector-bounded feedback nonlinearity, whose loop admits a limit cycle.

notes: Central object is the Lur'e feedback system (linear plant G(s) plus static sector nonlinearity phi) and a circle-criterion-type condition for oscillation onset. Equations given are mostly in transfer-function/frequency form; the underlying time-domain object is a first-order nonlinear ODE loop, so object_type ode with 'mixed' linearity. Some ambiguity between representing it as ode vs algebraic frequency condition.
